calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trustee'S Actions; For Order Allowing And Approving Trustee'S Compromise And Settlement Of Claims
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Rosenberg for petitioner Allen ginzburg.

Ms. Rosenberg informed the Court that there were no objections to the settlement of which she was aware. She stated that it was a very good result for the trust. The Court granted the petition for approval of the settlement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)
